purpose: Machine-readable contract for process-step to UI-I/O readiness trace rows.

scope.storage_policy: Audit-run artifact under reports/process-step-ui-io-trace-2026-06-29. It must not be rendered in operational UI.

trace_row_shape.usecase_group: string or null; use grouped source if exact use-case traceability is unavailable

touchpoint_shape.type: route | component | api | service | model | test | report

evidence_ref_shape.type: test | source_file | service | api | database | audit_event | evidence_record | report | screenshot | manual_review
evidence_ref_shape.proof_kind: ui_display | input_control | command_behavior | persisted_state | output_state | audit_write | evidence_write | deny_or_fail_closed | no_leakage | no_overclaim

gap_priorities.P0: Safety, client leakage, advice release, compliance release, export, admin bypass or audit/evidence fail-closed risk.
gap_priorities.P1: Broken P0 journey, missing required input, missing expected output or missing process-critical workflow behavior.
gap_priorities.P2: UI visible or clickable but not sufficiently service-backed or persisted.
gap_priorities.P3: Traceability, proof, reporting or polish debt without immediate safety impact.

downgrade_rules.description: Route presence alone cannot be implemented.
Component dispatch or page shell presence alone cannot be implemented.
downgrade_rules.if: component_touchpoints exist only by page family inference and no input/output/action proof exists

downgrade_rules.description: Visible UI without command behavior, persisted output and proof cannot be implemented.
Actionable UI without service/workflow backing cannot be implemented.
downgrade_rules.if: ui_representation_state in [actionable_ui_only, actionable_with_blockers] and service_backing_state in [none, read_only, mock_or_seeded]

downgrade_rules.description: Service/API evidence without visible required input and output state cannot be implemented.
downgrade_rules.if: service_backing_state in [api_backed, workflow_backed, persisted] and missing required input UI or output state proof

downgrade_rules.description: Important or sensitive actions require audit/evidence write or fail-closed proof.

must_have: missing_layers excludes route_only_claim, component_only_claim, visible_only_claim, missing_service_backing, missing_persisted_output_state

validation_rules.description: Trace artifact must parse as JSON and include exactly 438 rows unless P0 source scope changes with explicit provenance.
Every row must have deterministic `trace_id`, `process_id` and `step_id`.
Enum fields must use values from this schema.
Rows marked implemented must pass all downgrade rules and must include positive proof; safety-sensitive implemented rows must also include negative proof and audit/evidence proof.
Rows with route touchpoints but no component touchpoints should be downgraded and summarized.
Rows with empty proof refs should be summarized by process, domain, area and missing layer.
High-risk samples must include client visibility, compliance release, export authority and admin/governance non-bypass rows.

acceptance_criteria: The trace schema can represent all 438 process steps.
A route-only step cannot be marked implemented.
A visible-only UI cannot be marked implemented.
Safety-sensitive steps without negative proof are downgraded.
The schema can support ticket creation from missing layers.
The schema does not require or authorize exposing internal process IDs in default operational UI.
